channel.title: Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Openai.com/Blog on .NET Ramblings

item.title: Codex for (almost) everything
item.description: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/codex-for-almost-everything

item.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
item.description: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/accelerating-cyber-defense-ecosystem

item.title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
item.description: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/the-next-evolution-of-the-agents-sdk

item.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
item.description: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/scaling-trusted-access-for-cyber-defense

item.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
item.description: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/cloudflare-openai-agent-cloud

item.title: AI fundamentals
item.description: Learn what AI is, how it works, and how tools like ChatGPT use large language models. A clear, beginner-friendly guide to understanding artificial intelligence. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/what-is-ai

item.title: Analyzing data with ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how to analyze data with ChatGPT by exploring datasets, generating insights, creating visualizations, and turning findings into actionable decisions. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/data-analysis

item.title: Applications of AI at OpenAI
item.description: Explore how OpenAI products like ChatGPT, Codex, and APIs bring AI into real-world use for work, development, and everyday tasks. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/applications-of-ai

item.title: Brainstorming with ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how to use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas, organize thinking, and turn rough concepts into structured, actionable plans. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/brainstorming

item.title: ChatGPT for customer success teams
item.description: Learn how customer success teams use ChatGPT to manage accounts, improve communication, reduce churn, and drive adoption and renewals. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/customer-success

item.title: ChatGPT for finance teams
item.description: Learn how finance teams use ChatGPT to streamline reporting, analyze data, improve forecasts, and communicate insights more clearly. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/finance

item.title: ChatGPT for managers
item.description: Learn how managers use ChatGPT to prepare for conversations, write clear feedback, stay organized, and improve team effectiveness. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/managers

item.title: ChatGPT for marketing teams
item.description: Learn how marketing teams use ChatGPT to plan campaigns, generate content, analyze performance, and move from ideas to execution faster. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/marketing

item.title: ChatGPT for operations teams
item.description: Learn how operations teams use ChatGPT to streamline workflows, improve coordination, standardize processes, and drive faster execution. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/operations

item.title: ChatGPT for research
item.description: Learn how to use ChatGPT for research to gather sources, analyze information, and create structured, citation-backed insights. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/research

item.title: ChatGPT for sales teams
item.description: Learn how sales teams use ChatGPT to research accounts, personalize outreach, manage deals, and improve pipeline and conversion. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/sales

item.title: Creating images with ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how to create and refine images with ChatGPT using clear prompts, iterate on designs, and generate high-quality visuals in minutes. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/image-generation

item.title: Financial services
item.description: Explore AI resources for financial services, including prompt packs, GPTs, guides, and tools to help institutions deploy and scale AI securely. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/financial-services

item.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/getting-started

item.title: Healthcare
item.description: Explore how clinicians use ChatGPT to support diagnosis, documentation, and patient care with secure, HIPAA-compliant AI tools. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/healthcare

item.title: Personalizing ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how to personalize ChatGPT using custom instructions and memory to get more relevant, consistent, and tailored responses. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/personalization

item.title: Prompting fundamentals
item.description: Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/prompting

item.title: Research with ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/search-and-deep-research

item.title: Responsible and safe use of AI
item.description: Learn how to use AI responsibly with best practices for safety, accuracy, and transparency when using tools like ChatGPT. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/responsible-and-safe-use

item.title: Using custom GPTs
item.description: Learn how to build and use custom GPTs to automate workflows, maintain consistent outputs, and create purpose-built AI assistants. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/custom-gpts

item.title: Using projects in ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how to use orojects in ChatGPT to organize chats, files, and instructions, manage ongoing work, and collaborate more effectively. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/projects

item.title: Using skills
item.description: Learn how to create and use ChatGPT skills to build reusable workflows, automate recurring tasks, and ensure consistent, high-quality outputs. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/skills

item.title: Working with files in ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how to upload and work with files in ChatGPT to analyze data, summarize documents, and generate content from PDFs, spreadsheets, and more. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/working-with-files

item.title: Writing with ChatGPT
item.description: Learn how to use ChatGPT for writing to draft, revise, and refine content with clear structure, tone, and intent. Link to article: https://openai.com/academy/writing

item.title: CyberAgent moves faster with ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex
item.description: CyberAgent uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to securely scale AI adoption, improve quality, and accelerate decisions across advertising, media, and gaming. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/cyber-agent

item.title: OpenAI Full Fan Mode Contest: Terms & Conditions
item.description: Explore the official terms and conditions for the OpenAI Full Fan Mode Contest, including eligibility, entry steps, judging criteria, and prize details. Learn how to participate, submit your entry on Instagram, and win IPL match tickets. Link to article: https://openai.com/index/full-fan-mode-contest-terms-conditions
